programme.title: The Old Spanish Trail
programme.desc:
The Old Spanish Trail is a documentary film about the historic trail tracking the journey of Richard Waller Otis Calef and Jim Clark on horseback 1200 miles from Los Angeles to Santa Fe They rode the trail in two legs fall of 2014 and summer of 2015
The Old Spanish Trail witnessed a brief but furious heyday between 1830 and 1848 as a trade route linking Santa Fe New Mexico and Los Angeles California The riders run into problems staying true to trail because of highways and private land during their ride tracing the past The film is a reminder to all of us to protect and preserve the natural landscape and its trails

programme.title: In Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: Kentucky loses his horse in a rigged horse race and gets framed for the murder of a stagecoach driver

programme.title: The Oklahoma Cyclone
programme.desc: A search for his missing father prompts a cowboy to infiltrate a gang of desperadoes

programme.title: Round up Time in Texas
programme.desc: Gene and Frog arrive with a herd of horses for Genes brother a diamond prospector whose work has attracted the interest of a bunch of bad guys

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: While at the Mermaid Bar Agent James West is shot with a blow dart by a woman disguised as a Mermaid When he comes to West finds himself aboard a ship where he meets an unusual woman with a mysterious compact Suddenly the ship is attacked by a fire breathing dragon and ship explodes After floating to shore Jim meets Arte and they unveil the secrets of a new weapon a dragon-like torpedo attracted to a homing device in a womans compact Together they must find the weapon before a government ship loaded with a cargo of explosives arrives in the San Francisco harbor

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a girl mysteriously disappears from school Friday and Gannon try to find her and they find out that there are more questions than answers One question is was she abducted by a man named Harper

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An old Vaudevillian finds 9 one thousand dollar bills on the street He uses one to buy his friends drinks at a dive The next morning a private detective claims that the money was lost by a big time gambler and pressures him to give it back he does and discovers that the detective was a con man

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A computer scientist appalled to discover that his chauffeur was actually Dr Kimble uses his new state-of-the-art computer to assist Gerard and predict Kimbles movements from city to city

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike discovers a kidnapped scientist being held in an underwater prison cell

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Offshore near Santa BarbaraNelson is testing a sea scooter Meanwhilea know-it-all ex-athlete and his wife are spending the day at the beach with their two kids The kids are carelessly allowed to explore the area and end up trapped in a cave which high-tide will engulf Nelson and his scooter attempt to be of help

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Lt Wilson a young inexperienced fighter pilot is so eager to get his first kill and fit in with his flying mates that he manages to shoot up Gallaghers plane while chasing an enemy fighter Gallagher is willing to chalk it up to youthful exuberance and let the matter drop but Sandy takes it personally and makes Wilsons life miserable To make up for it Wilson volunteers for a dangerous mission and ends up saving Gallaghers life at great peril to his own This makes him an instant hero especially in Sandys eyes It also leaves him craving even more attention but at what risk

programme.title: Dark 306
programme.desc: Dark 306

programme.title: Dark 391
programme.desc: Dark 391

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Dark 390
programme.desc: Dark 390

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: The story revolves around Shane a bounty hunter who helps a family of farmers being harassed by the local goons

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A married woman is into watching game shows She gets onto one which becomes a nightmare wherein if she answers correctly her husband dies She wins 1000000 then travels back in time warning herself to get rid of the money or else her husband will die

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: The year is 1918 During World War I somewhere in France its the 49th day of continuous battle on the front lines Lieutenant Martin Kalthrob doesnt want to be in the army anymore and asks his father General Kalthrob for a discharge His father refuses but says he will transfer him to the rear if he leads a patrol to the German lines and fix the broken communication line When he proves himself to be a coward his father orders a court martial with penalty of death by firing squad

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A sculptor uses a drifter and his own abused girlfriend to recreate a murdersuicide

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Smarmy and opportunistic reality TV show host Jerry Rulac does an expose on the wild punk nightclub scene for the latest segment of his television program Why Are You Here Jerry uncovers more than he bargained for when he decides to focus on troubled wealthy party girl Donette and her unpredictable gaggle of scary friends

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric confronts the werewolf Nicholas Remy and discovers that he is more formidable an opponent than Skorzeny ever was

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes to the aid of a blind woman with a talent for trick shooting he meets while working at a carnival when he learns that her fiancé plans on killing her for the insurance money

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick and Schanke are followed by a crew from a reality television show When Nick is caught vamping vampire enforcers try to kill all who saw

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A mysterious teacup gives an elderly woman the power of eternal youth -- at a cost

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A lovely French girl agrees to help the guys out in a plan to raise expense money for the birth of Christys child

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer makes friends with a hillbilly named Branch

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Troy is captured while trying to make contact with the underground in a small village At stake is micro-film information about a new type of bomb the Germans have developed

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The hungry castaways find a wild duck on the island but they dont know whether to use it as food or attach a message to him and hope for rescue

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Christmas wish appears to be coming true when a radio broadcast tells them their rescue is imminent While they wait they recall the first days on the island when Gilligan lost the radio and transmitter

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Luke is set up by a traveling show to take part in a boxing match Kate objects which leaves Grandpa to defend the McCoy family honor

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: George opens a gas station and he makes the mistake of hiring Amos

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max becomes a drunken jobless bum so that KAOS will recruit him

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Buildings are being blown up in Washington by paintings that include explosives

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ Callie and Stacks help BJs old friend Steven Thomas Ulysses Nathaniel Travis complete the filming of his television pilot Buster Crabbe is outstanding as an aging stuntman with a secret

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed volunteers to be shot into outer space

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Through Rogers trickery Ed believes that he has a shameful heritage so he runs away from home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Sergeant Schultz impersonates Klink in a scheme to get some of his men free from the Gestapo

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: To get an Italian officer to defect the Heroes use pizza to tempt him

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys must scheme to procure new engines for their beloved boat before Binghamton ships the 73 Crew out to a new location

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: Fortress

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: The Presidents Plane Is Missing
programme.desc: An American President stumbles upon a secret world-threatening crisis

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: Wes Cravens Night Visions
programme.desc: A cop teams up with a psychic to track down a serial killer

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hughie Hogg returns with his eye on the office of Hazzard County Sheriff He blackmails his Uncle Boss into supporting his campaign by threatening to take secretly taken photographs of his criminal activities to the FBI Coy and Vance decide to support incumbent Rosco while they collect enough evidence to derail Hughies campaign and run him out of town

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: An old business partner of Augurs is hired by Daan to get information about the Resistance resulting in the death of many members Meanwhile Sandoval finds out he has a life threatening blood disorder

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Morthren manipulate a Corporate magnate by seemingly restoring his health into selling them a top city newspaper he controls to give the aliens a tool for propaganda

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Sheriff Andrews allows Dr Arcane to hunt an employee for sport To teach Andrews a lesson Alec traps him a fantasy of the old west populated by familiar faces forcing him to duel the evil Renegade Jake in a fight to the death

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: What happens when the swamp itself is no longer an ally to Swamp Thing The answers lay with a man called Mephisto

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Alien glyphs appear on all of Alphas screens Koenig sends an Eagle to investigate The Eagle is lost and the pilot is taken over by a huge alien Space Brain using him as a channel to make the Alphans do its bidding Koenig has to destroy it

programme.title: Stryker
programme.desc: The worlds water supply has dried up due to some sort of apocalypse A beautiful woman holds the secret to where one of the last springs being guarded by a group of Amazons A Road Warrior like crew captures her and tries to make her talk through brutal torture The hero Styrker unites with some of the remaining good guys and the Amazons and frees the woman

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath arrives in a dying desert town only to find himself a visitor in a madhouse His hosts are five deranged people who play bizarre and deadly games with their infrequent guests Heaths role in their hellish fantasy the accused--on trial for rape and murder

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne interrupts a stagecoach attack but when it crashes he is left to take care of the lone survivor - a baby Cheyenne learns that a land grabber murdered to get his claim then Cheyenne must protect the dead mans heir - the baby

programme.title: Young 301
programme.desc: Young 301

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A traveling hit-woman seduces Inspector Keller gaining valuable intelligence for her San Francisco assignments A mob hired her to help win a gang war which Keller is investigating Kellers superior Lt Mike Stone hears wedding bells but death knells are more likely as shes living in a bay-side apartment next to the younger love-struck Keller

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Taggert a US industrialist has acquired a jade figure which has great religious significance to Kuala Rokat That nation is a small but strategically located nation which borders China Taggerts acquisition threatens to undo years of sensitive US diplomacy but there is no legal way to force him to give the figure back Phelps devises a plan which among other things calls for causing havoc with Taggerts mainframe computer Rollin impersonating an academic from Kuala Rokat and using a highly trained cat in getting the jade away from Taggert

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A woman invites Friday and Gannon to talk to her Womans Club about battered children They train the women to be on the lookout for children who might be abused and how they can help by becoming foster parents

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon go undercover at a hotel to find the location of an illegal gambling operation Soon after spreading the word theyre looking for some action they are driven to a late-night game in the Hollywood Hills After the game the detectives give the location of the residence to their boss and a raid is set for the following night

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is captured by Lt Gerard while traveling with a group of migrant workers During a violent wind storm Gerard is badly injured and Kimble has to convince the others to help him save Gerards life

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: An old love of Heaths who had jilted him five years before convinces him to help get her Mexican husband to the US The husband is a Revolutionary wanted by the Federales - and a man with questionable motives

programme.title: Attack Force Z
programme.desc: During World War II a top-secret Australian attack unit penetrates Japanese lines to perform a daring rescue mission to rescue the American crew of a crashed plane

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Sir Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw steals the big red ruby of India to use in his superlaser to destroy US communications satellites

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians must defeat the invading aliens as well as the Renegades

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Nick Matt and AJ are kidnapped at the heart of Gobotron but when they escape the Renegades they fall into the hands of Wrecks the leader of a gang of thieves who enters Matt in a bizarre form of gladiatorial combat

programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce pleads with Hercs former intergalactic commando leader General Zhest to help them fight Monster Minds The general is too afraid of Saw Boss and Jayce persuades Zhests son to join the fight Saw Boss poisons the water of the planet

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Unknown to Saw Boss Audric is captured and one of many on board a slave ship Jayces root responds to Audrics and a disguised Jayce boards the slave ship in search of Audric Audrics friends mistakenly think Jayce is an enemy

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: MASK travels to Africa to stop a botched experiment which has created a deadly blue slime consuming everything in its path VENOM learns of the slime and seeks to control it in order to take the world hostage

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An ex-minister from West Germany hires VENOM to help him spread a virus that turns money bills into blank pieces of paper

programme.desc: Legacy for the Survivors

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: When the lost city of Kongoland arises after 1000 years the N-Team goes to investigate When they arrive an ancient treasure possesses Princess Lana with the spirit of Konga the leader of the Konkas

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Count Gruemon steals Kevins Power Pad and Zapper in Hyrule Kevin and Link head out to the world of Puss n Boots to retrieve the stolen items

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadgets assignment here is to protect a star musician Rick Rocker However Rick is startled by Gadgets appearance and is trying to avoid him But Dr Claw is planning to make some kind of mind-control record he wants to use Rick rocker So Gadget must protect Rick Rocker from Dr Claw and stop Claws production of the mind-control record
